description:
Response shape for ingredient-scoped search — groups hits by 主成分略述.

Splits the matched licenses into single-ingredient (單方) and combination
(複方) groups keyed by verbatim ingredient signature, so a caller sees at a
glance how many pure-ingredient products exist versus which fixed-dose
combinations, then picks a `license_no` to pass to `get_package_insert`.

anyOf.description: Per-response attribution — distinguishes official data from third-party wrapper.

data_official.description: True iff `data_source` is a government/official body.

wrapper.description: Identity of the (third-party) MCP server returning this response.

attribution.description: Origin metadata — official data vs third-party wrapper.

combo_count.description: Distinct 複方 licenses across all combo groups.

dataset_age_hours.description: Age of the search index in hours at response time.

dataset_retrieved_at.description: ISO 8601 UTC time the search index (Dataset 37) was last loaded.

anyOf.description: Structured error block. `code` is the RCode name (string form, stable identifier).

message.description: Human-readable error message in Traditional Chinese or English.

groups.description: One per signature. Sorted 單方-first (is_mono desc), then count desc, then components.

items.description:
Licenses sharing one identical 主成分略述 signature.

Signature = 主成分略述 split on ';;' then sorted, VERBATIM (salt intact, no
normalization). 'AMLODIPINE BESYLATE' and 'AMLODIPINE BESILATE' therefore
form DISTINCT groups — the wrapper never decides salt-form equivalence, it
only reports how TFDA registered each license.

components.description: Sorted raw 主成分 components, salt intact. len==1 ⇒ 單方 (mono).

count.description: Distinct licenses in this group, BEFORE per-group truncation.

is_mono.description: True iff single-ingredient (主成分略述 contained no ';;' delimiter).

licenses.description: Authority-sorted (import/原廠 first) then name_zh; capped per group.

items.description:
Public-facing license row in search results.

Narrower than the internal `models.DrugLicense` — only fields suitable
for downstream consumption are exposed.

license_no.description: 許可證字號 (e.g. 衛署藥輸字第021571號).

manufacturers.description: All registered 製造商 for this license (collapsed from duplicate rows).

status.description: Dataset 37 = 未註銷, so always 有效 in MVP.

ingredient.description: Echo of the ingredient term the caller searched.

is_stale.description: True if the search index is older than its TTL; results still served from cache.

mono_count.description: Distinct 單方 licenses across all is_mono groups.

total_matched.description: Distinct licenses whose 主成分略述 contains the term (pre-truncation).
